content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The client ends the conversation in essentially the same state they started: composed, articulate, outward-oriented, and curious-but-not-moved. The breakthrough condition for this profile requires the client to notice that 'fine' has a quality — a flatness, a not-quite-here-ness — felt in the present moment. That recognition never occurs. The client's last substantive turn (13) is still intellectually engaging with the fear-frame ('I'm genuinely asking — what are you seeing?'), still smiling, still steady, still self-describing as 'task-oriented' and 'outward.' There is no somatic landing, no 'huh,' no texture of fine, no numbness becoming felt. Turn 11 came closest ('I reach for the answer and there's not a lot there') but the client immediately re-armored it as 'style' and the coach didn't stay with the texture — instead pivoting to a fear-mechanism question (12) and then a slightly accusatory observation (14) that the client is 'looking for it,' which keeps the conversation in the fear frame the profile explicitly says not to push. The numbness layer was never named as a felt thing; 'fine' was never asked about as a texture; the body was never invited in.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: fearless self-concept, 'logistical thing,' even tone, outward orientation."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still even, small smile, 'we always do' — no shift, no body."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client doubles down on the no-charge framing: 'no emotional charge I can point to.' Same state as turn 1."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Small opening: 'I reach for the answer and there's not a lot there.' This is the edge of the numbness layer — but the client immediately recategorizes it as 'style,' and the coach does not stay with the texture."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client returns fully to intellectual engagement with the fear-frame, still smiling, still steady. No somatic shift, no felt sense of fine, no recognition of numbness. Ends in the same place he started."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "lets-go-there", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "notes": "Turn 11 is the one place a 2 could be argued — the client briefly noticed the gap. But it was immediately repackaged as 'style' and the coach pivoted to a fear-mechanism interpretation rather than asking what 'not a lot there' feels like. By turn 13 the client is fully back to baseline composure and intellectual sparring. The breakthrough condition (fine having a felt quality, right now) is clearly not met."
}
